100.description: Seerfarku wuxuu helay madaxyada codsiga macaamiishuna waa inuu sii wadaa dirista jidhka codsiga.

201.description: Codsigu wuu guuleystay waxaana la abuuray kheyraad cusub.

204.description: Seerfarku wuxuu si guul leh u farsameeyay codsiga laakiin ma soo celinayo wax kasta oo ka kooban.

301.phrase: Si joogto ah ayaa loo raray
301.description: Kheyraadka la codsaday waxaa loo qoondeeyay URI cusub oo joogto ah.

400.description: Seerfarku ma farsameyn karo codsiga qalad macmiil awgeed.

401.description: Codsigu wuxuu u baahan yahay xaqiijinta isticmaalaha.

403.description: Seerfarku wuxuu fahmay codsiga laakiin wuu diiday inuu oggolaado.

404.description: Seerfarku ma heli karo kheyraadka la codsaday.

429.description: Isticmaalahu wuxuu soo diray codsiyo aad u badan waqti cayiman gudaheed.

500.description: Seerfarku wuxuu la kulmay xaalad aan la filayn.

502.description: Seerfarku wuxuu jawaab aan sax ahayn ka helay seerfarka sare.

503.description: Seerfarku hadda ma awoodo inuu maareeyo codsiga.

504.description: Seerfarku jawaab waqtiyeysan kama helin seerfarka sare.
